mapper.sql: id, config_key, config_value, config_type, config_name, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM system_config WHERE config_type = #{configType} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM system_config ORDER BY config_type, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_config (config_key, config_value, config_type, config_name, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configType}, #{configName}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE system_config SET config_key=#{configKey}, config_value=#{configValue}, config_type=#{configType}, config_name=#{configName}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE system_config SET config_value = #{configValue} WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
